SubmitOutput.description:
Shape-only submit envelope output.

``adapter_receipt`` is opaque — domain-specific receipt data lives there.
``transaction_id`` is deterministic per invocation (content-hash, FR-004).

adapter_receipt.description: Opaque adapter-specific receipt (e.g. 접수번호, authorization code). Main envelope does NOT narrow this shape.
adapter_receipt.title: Adapter Receipt

transaction_id.description: Deterministic per invocation (content-hash of input + adapter_nonce) — FR-004.
transaction_id.title: Transaction Id

SubmitOutput.title: SubmitOutput

SubmitStatus.description:
Terminal / non-terminal disposition from the adapter.

Failed adapter invocations surface as ``failed`` or ``rejected``,
never as an unhandled Python exception (FR-005).
SubmitStatus.title: SubmitStatus

description:
Typed params for the traffic fine payment adapter.

Ministry-specific vocabulary lives HERE, not on the main SubmitInput envelope.
Adapters validate params against this model at invocation time.

SC-002: ``payment_method``, ``fine_reference`` are domain fields and MUST
NOT appear on ``SubmitInput`` / ``SubmitOutput``.

fine_reference.description: Unique identifier for the traffic fine (e.g. 이의신청번호 or 고지서번호).
fine_reference.title: Fine Reference

payment_method.description: Payment channel for the fine settlement.
payment_method.title: Payment Method

title: mock_traffic_fine_pay_v1
